title: 目標達成の後に・拍動、強く

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap has continued to impress, race after
race. It's clear as day how talented she really is.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Thanks for waiting for me. Okay, let's head back.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's Oguri Cap! She's been doing really well
lately!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
She's improved so much. It's only a matter of time
now!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...I think people are talking about me.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Is it? Maybe it's because I've been more confident
lately.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I've learned a lot through all the races I've been
running. Maybe I need to give myself some more
credit.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: So... what race should I enter next?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All eyes at the racecourse are on Oguri Cap.
Considering her achievements thus far, there's
only one place for her to go next.
choice_data_list: Shall we enter a G1 race?
Shall we enter a G1 race?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning a G1 race is a surefire route to glory. As
such, these races are special to both Umamusume
and their fans.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap has really come a long way... I'm sure
she can do it.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: A G1 race... I guess that's fine.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
No, I am... The bigger the race, the more likely
it'll be that people back home will hear about me.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
My driving force is still the same. I just wanna
show them that I can come out on top!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I know that Oguri Cap's supporters back home
serve as her motivation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But to win a G1 race, she'll need more than just
that. It's important that Oguri Cap think in the
long term and set her goals accordingly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I need to make her set her sights even
higher—and I know just how to do that.
choice_data_list: Come on! There's a race we need to go and see!
Come on! There's a race we need to go and see!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: What race?

text_block_list.name: Spectator C
text_block_list.text:
I wonder who's going to take the crown this time.
This is so exciting!

text_block_list.name: Spectator D
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, when you voted someone in, it really
makes you wanna root for 'em, right?! It's the final
showdown of the year, so go get 'em, racers!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Wow, everybody's so fired up. So this is the Arima
Kinen, huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen—a race where the competitors
are chosen by a fan poll. Some even refer to it as
the deciding race of the year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The hype around this race is second to none. I'm
sure some part of it will strike a chord with Oguri
Cap.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's about to start... That's weird. Why's my
heart pounding?
choice_data_list: Make sure to pay close attention.
Make sure to pay close attention.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Got it!

text_block_list.name: Crowd
text_block_list.text: Woooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This year's Arima Kinen winds up being one of the
most thrilling ever.

text_block_list.name: Spectator E
text_block_list.text:
Wow, that was incredible! Almost made me tear
up...

text_block_list.name: Spectator F
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... She won the Grand Prix! I'm so happy! I'm so glad I chose to support her!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Nothing. I just feel... kind of emotional.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I felt a little weepy after going face-to-face with
central-level racers for the first time—and after
winning my debut race too... But this is something
else entirely.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hey... Actually, I—

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Wait, isn't that Oguri Cap?!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: You're right! It is her! Hey, Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Spectator C
text_block_list.text:
I've been watching all your races lately! I'm
cheering for you!

text_block_list.name: Spectator G
text_block_list.text: Watching you race is always so exciting!

text_block_list.name: Spectator F
text_block_list.text:
I'll vote for you for next year's Arima Kinen! I
hope you're able to run!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Oh! Th-thank you!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Your support means a lot to me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After hearing so many words of encouragement
from her fans, Oguri Cap seems to have found
some new resolve.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hey...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Turns out there are even people in the city
rooting for me now.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I want their cheers to propel me on the track.
And... I want the folks back home to see me
racing here.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I wanna race in the Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
...So, what's your ultimate goal? What kind of
race do you want to run in?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Umm... Well... I...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though Oguri Cap has never set her sights on a
specific race before, I notice an undeniable sense
of determination in her gaze. I know exactly what
to suggest.
choice_data_list: Let's aim for the Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah! Let's do it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With next year's Arima Kinen as her goal, Oguri
Cap begins her training once again.
